string.text: I should seek guidance from Rabbit.
I should go meet Sidorovich in Cordon.
I should go meet Xenotech in Cordon.
I should go meet Beard aboard the Skadovsk.
I should go meet Noah in Zaton.
I should go meet Colonel Petrenko in Rostok.
I should go meet Mangun in Rostok.
I should go meet Lukash in the Military Warehouses.
I should go meet Loki in Yanov Station.
I should go meet Cold in the Great Swamp.
I should go meet Librarian in the Great Swamp.
I should go meet Professor Sakharov in Yantar.
I should go meet Tukarev in Jupiter.
I should go meet Dushman in Dead City.
I should go meet Hog in Dead City.
I should go meet Colonel Kuznetsov in Agroprom.
I should go meet Lieutenant Kirilov in Agroprom.
I should go meet Sultan in Dark Valley.
I should go meet Olivius in Dark Valley.
I should go meet Rabbit in Pripyat.
I should go meet Cleric in Pripyat.
I should go meet Stribog in the Red Forest.
I should go meet Dazhbog in the Red Forest.
I should go meet Olivar in the Outskirts.
I should go meet Griffith in the Outskirts.
I should go meet Vector in Zaton.
I should go meet Klenov in Jupiter.
I'm running low on supplies. If you happen to have any on hand, or are willing to bring me some, I would be very grateful.
I'm low on %ss. Do you have any to spare? Come find me if you get your hands on any.
I'm low on %ss. Have you got some on you? Come find me if you have any extra.
Tell you what: I'll trade you some of my extra ammo, if you can get me some %ss.
I must be strong to serve the Monolith, but I confess my strength is weakening. Can you help me, brother?
Yeah, I got mugged, and I lost my favourite rifle. Can you help me find a new one?
I need an untraceable %s. Find it, steal it, fix it, whatever you gotta do; just get me one. I'll pay you double what it's worth.
A bandit has a special recipe for preparing mutant meat and needs %s for it.
A Renegade has a special recipe for preparing mutant meat and needs %s for it.
Thank you, stalker. This will help immensely in my research.
Hey, man, can you grab some patches from the Duty scum for me? That'll help me rest easier.
Hey, man, can you grab some patches from the Duty scum for me? That'll help me rest easier.
Mad respect, bro! Here, catch, this artefact's yours.
Nicely done, stalker. Here, take this artefact before someone sees us.
A free stalker has asked me to collect %s.
Hello brother, want to kill some bastards? You give me their patches, and I'll give you a sweet little artefact. What do you say?
Hello brother, want to kill some bastards? You give me their patches, and I'll give you a sweet little artefact. What do you say?
Thank you, brother, you're a real help. Here's your artefact.
Hey, pal. I have a job for you. There's too many punks out there interfering with our business. Whack some of them and bring me their patches, will you?
Hey, pal. I have a job for you. There's too many punks out there interfering with our business. Whack some of them and bring me their patches, will you? I need %ses.
Look at that, good job. Take this artefact, along with my respects.
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case. How about you get us some %ss and I give you something in return?
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case.
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case. How about you get us some %ss and I give you something in return?
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case.
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case. How about you get us some %ss and I give you something in return?
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case.
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case. How about you get us some %ss and I give you something in return?
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case.
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case. How about you get us some %ss and I give you something in return?
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case.
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case. How about you get us some %ss and I give you something in return?
My squad is about to head over to another part of the Zone. We'd like to stock up on extra supplies, just in case.

We're trying to get improved gear and stocking up on our supplies, since we're headed to the more dangerous parts of the Zone on an important mission. We're looking for crafting kits and other equipment. Would you by any chance get us a %s? We'll reward you well for it, stalker.
We're trying to get improved gear and stocking up on our supplies, which is why we need crafting kits and other equipment.
You did it! These are so rare to find nowadays, braant. Here is your reward. You did very well.
A fellow Freedomer asked me to bring him some %s for stress relief.

Hey man, do you think you could bring me just a little %ss? I don't have a problem or anything, I just really need them to take the edge off. The Zone is stressful man, I really need to be less wired. Could you help a brother in need?
Could you bring me some %ss? I really need it to take the edge off. The Zone is stressful as hell.
See this old crappy gear that I have? It's wearing out, and I haven't been able to fix it until now. I need to repair it as soon as possible.

See this old crappy gear that I have? It's wearing out, and I haven't been able to fix it until now. I need to repair it as soon as possible. Can you get me some %ss? I will give you something nice in return.
Stalker, our teammate was wounded and taken hostage! I'm in desperate need of someone capable enough to stage a rescue operation. Do you think you can help us out and save our friend?
Trying to climb the ranks, are you? Tell you what, hotshot: I happen to know the location of a certain high-value target the brass wants eliminated. I'll bet you can't even get close to him.
For real? You really did it? Damn, if I though you had a chance I never would have made this bet. Well, a deal's a deal.
I do, actually. I've taken on a few too many jobs. You want to take over one of my contracts for me? I'll give you some of the bounty on it.
I'm trying to do some important studies in a certain area, but the squatters there keep shooting at me every time I get close. Can you convince them to leave?
Thank you stalker, you've helped me immensely. Please take this, as a token of my gratitude.

You're not gonna believe this. When I came past this area during my, uh, patrol, I spotted some Monolith not too far from here. I've gotta radio Lukash and the boys about this. In the meantime, can you keep an eye out on the Monolith for me? I'd help, but I've got a really bad hangover - I mean, headache - so I think the psy-fields nearby are getting to me.

Holy shit, I just said to keep an eye on them, but you vaporized the fuckers. Lukash just told me he was sending reinforcements, but I guess they aren't needed any more. Oh, I guess you've earned this, with my compliments. Now, no offense, but if this is what you do to stalkers you're keeping an eye on, I don't want you anywhere near me. I've got a bottle - I mean, patrol - to get back to. So long, stalker.

What’s up bro? Want to make some cash for a good cause? I’ve got a shipment of, ah, 'medical supplies' dropped off somewhere recently. Could you pick it up and bring it here? It's a little out-of-the-way, but you shouldn't have much trouble.

Haha, nice! You made it. Thanks a bunch, man. Me and the boys have a lot of ‘injuries’ we need to take care of, so you’re right on fuckin’ time. Hope you didn't try to sample anything you couldn't handle. Alright, man, here. You have my thanks.
I have some important documents that I stashed away when I was attacked by mutants. I don't dare to go back there. If you can you get them for me, I'll gladly pay you.
A stalker asked to find a PDA for him.
Clear the area where intruders have been sighted. Destroy any enemy combatants.
There's a certain group nearby who might post a risk to our squad's mission. I don't care how you do it, but we want them out of the area. I hope you're willing to secure the area.

Our clients are studying artefacts, and they need the "%s" artefact. Guess who's the lucky guy that got this assignment? Do me a favour and help me find this one. I've got a very nice reward that I think you'll like.

Part of our job in this place is to study and report on anomalous activities. I need someone to study an anomaly field, take measurements and bring back the results. \nI've got the right device for the job, it was designed to endure harsh environmental conditions, and collect accurate data despite the interference. \nWhat do you say?
The Zone must be purified from the intruding filth. Kill the scum and bring me their uniform patches.
The Zone must be purified from the intruding filth. Kill the scum and bring me their uniform patches.

Listen up, stalker. We've been tasked to kill a dangerous night creature. It must be done tonight, or it will come back later to kill more of our comrades. We can't let that happen. We can use an extra hand if you're willing to help. Join me, and together we can bring the beast down. What do you say?
I was asked to help hunt down a dangerous predator that roams at night. Better find it before dawn.
Last night, a predator was roaming the area. It killed one of our pals, so we are going to hunt that fucker down before it hides in the morning. Do you want to join us?
An Ecologist is offering a reward in exchange for a %s artefact.

One of our undercover agents infiltrated an enemy faction. However, we're afraid the enemy is growing suspicious of him. He didn't respond to our last few communication attempts, and hasn't sent us any messages either. He's probably being kept under close watch, not to mention that they might get rid of him without waiting for proof. We need to bail him out. We were able to find his location, but it seems he's not alone. Kill the enemy squad, and escort the agent to our base. You can recognise him by his rifle, he wields an SVD. A word of warning: he'll shoot at you when you attack the squad to keep up appearances should things go south, so keep this in mind.
Excellent, I'll have him back at once.
Stop shooting! I'm the spy! Sorry, but I had to try and keep my cover. Let's go back to base now.
This is where we part ways. Thanks for everything, and farewell.
Th-thank you! If you were just a few minutes later, I don't know what would - no, I don't want to think about that. I owe you my life, comrade.
Come with me if you want to live!
Special Order: Collect the Goods from Nimble
The goods are ready. Time to collect them from Nimble.
Special Order: Wait for Delivery
I've placed my order with Nimble. Now I just need to wait for it to be ready.
Attention! Emission imminent!
Emission imminent, proceed to shelter immediately!
Leaving the shelter during an emission is a death sentence.
Emission: Find shelter
Emission: Stay sheltered
Attention!
Radioactive fallout begins.
The level of radiation is dangerous. You should hide from the radioactive fallout.
I shouldn't leave shelter during radioactive fallout.
Radioactive fallout: find shelter
Radioactive fallout: stay sheltered
Attention!
Radioactive fallout has ended.
Attention!
Chemical fallout begins.
This level of contamination is dangerous. You should hide from the chemical fallout.
I shouldn't leave shelter during a chemical fallout.
Chemical fallout: find shelter
Chemical fallout: stay sheltered
Attention!
Chemical fallout has ended.
Attention!
Psy-storm begins.
I should hide from the psy-storm.
I shouldn't leave shelter during a psy-storm.
Psy-storm: find shelter
Psy-storm: stay sheltered
Attention!
Psy-storm has ended.

It's hard to maintain my medical supplies with the number of injuries I have to treat every day. I'm worried I'll run out of bandages and medkits, sooner or later. I'd like you to bring me one of those old drug-making kits, so I can stretch my supplies.
I need to find the following items:
I will be paid extra if I bring these items:
